title: Tom Moran
compiled_truth: Tom Moran is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-09-08 to 2002-03-08), Tom Moran sent 40 and received 1543 emails, totalling 1583 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (25), [Stephanie Sever](people/stephanie-sever) (17), [Lisa Lees](people/lisa-lees) (15), [Wendi Lebrocq](people/wendi-lebrocq) (12), [Samuel Schott](people/samuel-schott) (11). Mailbox folders observed: bankrupt, deleted_items, inbox.
